subcodes.first_line: Praised be thy deed, O thou who hast attained unto tribulation in the path of God, the Creator of heaven! Blessed art thou, O thou who hast quaffed the cup [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لله عملک یا من فزت بالبلاء فی سبیل الله فاطر السماء نعیما لک یا من شربت کاس
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @unity; oneness of humanity, @consultation, @praise and encouragement, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @Word of God is its own standard
